memoryArtifacts.headline: Agnès de France (1260-1325)

zh.lifeSummary: 當Princesa Inés de Francia Duquesa de Borgoña於1260年出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲時，她的父親St. Louis IX roi de France46歲，母親Margarita de Provenza Reina Consorte de Francia39歲。她於1278年與Duque Roberto II de Borgoña結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1325年11月9日在法國布格o-達藍尼享年65歲，埋葬在法國布格o-達沙吉尼可拉-利斯-i奧。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Princesa Inés de Francia Duquesa de Borgoña于1260年出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲时，她的父亲St. Louis IX roi de France46岁，母亲Margarita de Provenza Reina Consorte de Francia39岁。她于1278年与Duque Roberto II de Borgoña结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1325年11月9日在法国布格o-達藍尼享年65岁，埋葬在法国布格o-達沙吉尼可拉-利斯-i奧。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Francia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Alejandro, Alberto, Angelico, Candelario, Fidencio, Jesus, Juan, Manuel, Margarito, Maximo, Nilo.  Italian Federico, Marco, Rocco, Romeo, Salvatore.

Italian and Spanish: literally ‘France’, hence an ethnic name denoting a Frenchman. However, Francia is also found in Renaissance Italy as a personal name (both male and female), and in some instances the surname may be from this use.
Hungarian: ethnicname for a Frenchman, from francia ‘French’.

variants.name: Frangella
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Carmine, Gilda, Nicola, Ottavio, Silvestro.  Spanish Alfonso, Jaime, Luis.
Italian: possibly from a feminine diminutive of   Francia   or   Franco  .

variants.name: Francione
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Adelmo, Gino, Mario, Orlando, Salvatore.
Italian: from an augmentative of   Francia  .

variants.name: Franza
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Alfredo, Eliodoro, Emilio, Giorgio, Lorenzo, Lucio, Orfeo, Rocco.
Italian (Lombardy): from a derivative of the personal name Francesco (see Francis ).

nameMeanings.name: Inés
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Agnes  , now also used, usually without the accent, in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Agnes
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Princesa Inés de Francia Duquesa de Borgoña was born in 1260, in Paris, Île-de-France, France, her father, St. Louis IX roi de France, was 46 and her mother, Margarita de Provenza Reina Consorte de Francia, was 39. She married Duque Roberto II de Borgoña in 1278. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 9 November 1325, in Lantenay, Côte-d'Or, Burgundy, France, at the age of 65, and was buried in Saint-Nicolas-lès-Cîteaux, Côte-d'Or, Burgundy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Princesa Inés de Francia Duquesa de Borgoña est née en 1260, à Paris, Île-de-France, France, son père, St. Louis IX roi de France, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Margarita de Provenza Reina Consorte de Francia, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé Duque Roberto II de Borgoña en 1278. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 9 novembre 1325, à Lantenay, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, France, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Saint-Nicolas-lès-Cîteaux, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Princesa Inés de Francia Duquesa de Borgoña 1260 in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater St. Louis IX roi de France 46 und ihre Mutter Margarita de Provenza Reina Consorte de Francia 39. Sie hat 1278 Duque Roberto II de Borgoña geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 9. November 1325 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Lantenay, Côte-d'Or, Burgund, Frankreich und wurde in Saint-Nicolas-lès-Cîteaux, Côte-d'Or, Burgund, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Princesa Inés de Francia Duquesa de Borgoña è nata il nel 1260 nel Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, sua padre, St. Louis IX roi de France, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Margarita de Provenza Reina Consorte de Francia, aveva 39 anni. Lei sposato Duque Roberto II de Borgoña nel 1278. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 9 novembre 1325, nel Lantenay, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolta a Saint-Nicolas-lès-Cîteaux, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Princesa Inés de Francia Duquesa de Borgoñaが1260年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスで生まれた時，父St. Louis IX roi de Franceは46歳，母Margarita de Provenza Reina Consorte de Franciaは39歳であった。1278年にDuque Roberto II de Borgoñaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1325年11月9日にフランスボウルゴグンクoテ-ド'オルランテナイで65歳で死去し，フランスボウルゴグンクoテ-ド'オルサイント-ニコラス-ルeス-クiテアウックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Princesa Inés de Francia Duquesa de Borgoña(이)가 1260년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 St. Louis IX roi de France(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margarita de Provenza Reina Consorte de Francia(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 1278년 Duque Roberto II de Borgoña(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1325년 11월 9일 프랑스 부르고그니 co테-드'어 랜티나이에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 부르고그니 co테-드'어 세인트-니콜라스-e스-ci테오스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Princesa Inés de Francia Duquesa de Borgoña nasceu em 1260, em Paris, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, St. Louis IX roi de France, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Margarita de Provenza Reina Consorte de Francia, tinha 39 anos. Ela casou-se com Duque Roberto II de Borgoña em 1278. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 9 de novembro de 1325, em Lantenay, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, França, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em Saint-Nicolas-lès-Cîteaux, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Princesa Inés de Francia Duquesa de Borgoña родилась в 1260 г. в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени St. Louis IX roi de France было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Margarita de Provenza Reina Consorte de Francia, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Duque Roberto II de Borgoña в 1278 г. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 9 ноября 1325 г. в местности лантенеи, кoте-д'ор, бургогн, Франция в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности сеинт-николас-лeс-кiтокс, кoте-д'ор, бургогн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Princesa Inés de Francia Duquesa de Borgoña nació en 1260, en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, su papá, St. Louis IX roi de France, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Margarita de Provenza Reina Consorte de Francia, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Duque Roberto II de Borgoña en 1278. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 9 de noviembre de 1325, en Lantenay, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en Saint-Nicolas-lès-Cîteaux, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia.
